zh.lifeSummary: 當James Hope Covey Sr於1687年3月4日出生在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利時，他的父親Hope Covey28歲，母親Mary Unknown23歲。他於1708年3月21日與Sarah Lanphere在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1729年3月21日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Hope Covey Sr于1687年3月4日出生在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利时，他的父亲Hope Covey28岁，母亲Mary Unknown23岁。他于1708年3月21日与Sarah Lanphere在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1729年3月21日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

en.lifeSummary: When James Hope Covey Sr was born on 4 March 1687, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, his father, Hope Covey, was 28 and his mother, Mary Unknown, was 23. He married Sarah Lanphere on 21 March 1708, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 March 1729, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Hope Covey Sr est né le 4 mars 1687, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, Hope Covey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Unknown, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Lanphere le 21 mars 1708, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1729, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Hope Covey Sr è nato il il 4 marzo 1687 nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Hope Covey, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary Unknown, aveva 23 anni. Morì il 21 marzo 1729, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Hope Covey Srが1687年3月4日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで生まれた時，父Hope Coveyは28歳，母Mary Unknownは23歳であった。1708年3月21日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーでSarah Lanphereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1729年3月21日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Hope Covey Sr(이)가 1687년 3월 4일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hope Covey(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Unknown(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1708년 3월 21일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 Sarah Lanphere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1729년 3월 21일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Hope Covey Sr nasceu em 4 de março de 1687, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Hope Covey, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Unknown, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Lanphere em 21 de março de 1708, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1729, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Hope Covey Sr родился 4 марта 1687 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Hope Covey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Unknown, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Lanphere 21 марта 1708 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 марта 1729 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

Se casó con Sarah Lanphere el 21 de marzo de 1708, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1729, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
